parameters.sessionKey: ={{ $('When chat message received').item.json.body?.sessionId || $('When chat message received').item.json.sessionId }}

parameters.description: Returns the portfolio owner's profile: name, title, bio, location, skills, experience, and contact info. Call this for any question about who they are, their skills, experience, or how to contact them.
Returns a list of portfolio projects with descriptions and technologies. Call this when a visitor asks about projects, portfolio, or past work.
Returns the services offered, with descriptions. Call this when a visitor asks what services are available, how they can help, or pricing/engagement info.
Returns frequently asked questions and answers about the portfolio owner. Call this when a visitor asks common questions.
Returns the current date and time in ISO format. ALWAYS call this before checking availability or creating a meeting so relative dates like 'tomorrow' or 'next Monday' are resolved correctly.
Check whether a time slot is free in Google Calendar before booking. Provide start and end times in ISO 8601 format. Returns available, busy_slots, checked_range.
parameters.inputSchema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "string", "description": "Start time in ISO 8601"}, "end_time": {"type": "string", "description": "End time in ISO 8601"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time"]}

parameters.description: Book a meeting in your Google Calendar. Call this ONLY after you have the visitor's name, email, desired date and time, AND check_availability has confirmed the slot is free. The tool validates the request, creates the event and returns { success, message }. Relay its message to the visitor. NEVER claim a meeting was created unless success is true.

value.slug: ={{ $('When chat message received').item.json.body?.slug || $('When chat message received').item.json.slug }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { output: $json.output || $json.text || JSON.stringify($json), sessionId: $('When chat message received').item.json.body?.sessionId || $('When chat message received').item.json.sessionId } }}
